stories: Geopolitics premium back in the tape: Middle East escalation pushes oil up, equities fade
Rates: yields grind higher as oil feeds inflation risk; Friday jobs report is the next macro catalyst
U.S. Treasury supply: refunding expectations = steady coupons, more bills as tariff refund cash needs loom
Australia: RBA delivers its 3rd hike of 2026; cash rate raised to 4.35%
UK inflation backdrop stays sticky: CPI cited at 4.5% in March (vs 4.3%)
Energy transition flows: renewables funds see biggest inflows in five years
Financials/fintech: banks reportedly try to offload a payments processor (risk-transfer tell)
Deal tape (confirmed): Long Lake to acquire $GBTG for $9.50/sh cash (~$6.3B), a 60.2% premium
Event risk (confirmed): Ryan Cohen/GameStop proposes ~$56B $EBAY deal; TD “highly confident” letter for ~$20B debt
Wildcard macro/FX: U.S. factory orders beat expectations; USD supported via “higher-for-longer” pricing
